description: Machine-readable runtime artifact bundle for GAQP-compliant implementations. This is the current working draft. Checksum and release date will be set at version freeze.

files.description: Seven admission tests with pass conditions
Forbidden labels, remap table, developer rules
Domain subtag taxonomy for Consumer (CON), Food & Beverage (FB), and Media & Entertainment (ME) sectors — 106, 100, and 128 subtags respectively. Used in domain_tags_pipe field.

Controlled vocabulary for the tags_pipe field. Four closed prefixes: func (business function), risk (risk category), topic (subject topic), geo (geography). Extensible values via IQS suggestion process.
.intel sidecar file format specification: naming convention, 14-section structure, validation rules, and example skeleton.

notes.tag_families: Partial. Consumer, Food & Beverage, and Media & Entertainment subtag taxonomies added in domain_subtags_consumer_fb_me.json. Remaining sectors pending.
notes.domain_modules: Domain module subtag taxonomy partially populated. Consumer (CON): 106 subtags, Food & Beverage (FB): 100 subtags, Media & Entertainment (ME): 128 subtags. Remaining sectors to be added.
notes.schema_freeze: Must reconcile full 37-column schema before GAQP v1.0 public release.
